reason: Check backend scope and referenced quality expectations.
Verify JSON persistence, migration, compatibility, and atomic writes.
Verify command-boundary validation and ok/err responses.
Verify workflow trace events and logging behavior.
Verify protocol alignment, dependency constraints, and backend test coverage.
Check frontend scope and referenced quality expectations.
Verify Compose UI structure and text/layout conventions.
Verify ViewModel state and backend snapshot handling.
Verify typed parser boundaries and response validation.
Verify app/core contract tests and forbidden patterns.
Check data flow across persistence, backend API, parser, ViewModel, and UI.
Check reuse of existing schedule, notification, route, and task execution patterns.
